questionHtml: Deduce the formula of the unknown compound based on its 1H NMR spectrum using section 27 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
C6H5COOCH3 «signal at 4 ppm (3.7 – 4.8 range in data table) due to alkyl group on ester

[1 mark]

meta.title: Deduce the formula of the unknown compound based on its 1H NMR spectrum using section 27 of the data booklet.
